case_title: POSITIVE RESOURCE CENTER VS. ANDREA WEAVER

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF POSITIVE RESOURCE CENTER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEAVER, ANDREA $1,519.66 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,584.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF POSITIVE RESOURCE CENTER AS TO DEFENDANT WEAVER, ANDREA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-05-2021 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF POSTIVE RESOURCE CENTER, REPRESENTED BY TINA GRECO, HR MANAGER, IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ANDREA WARVER IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS ARE REVIEWED AND RETURNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
